description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker Docker image with a docker:dind service, defines an IMAGE_TAG variable as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, and a single build stage. Add a build_image job in the build stage that runs only for tags, runs on linux runners, and executes the commands: docker login -u $DOCKER_USERNAME -p $DOCKER_PASSWORD, docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG . and docker push $IMAGE_TAG. The pipeline should push the built image to the GitLab Container Registry.
